items.title_en: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
items.title_zh: 石油高管表示，伊朗战争将以这些重要方式改变全球能源市场
items.desc_en: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡导致石油损失近10亿桶，而且短缺状况日益严重。

items.title_en: Micron and Qualcomm are among the most overbought stocks this week. Here are the others
items.title_zh: 美光和高通是本周超买最严重的股票之一。这是其他的
items.desc_en: A massive rally in memory chip stocks drove them to huge gains this week, but that's also left some of the highest fliers due for a possible decline soon.
items.desc_zh: 存储芯片股的大幅上涨推动它们本周大幅上涨，但这也导致一些表现最好的股票可能很快就会下跌。

items.title_en: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak: A luxury expedition cruise boom and new world of remote travel risks
items.title_zh: MV Hondius 汉坦病毒爆发：豪华探险邮轮热潮和远程旅行风险新世界
items.desc_en: Remote expedition cruises to destinations like Antarctica and the Arctic are booming, but the deadly hantavirus aboard MV Hondius is a reminder of unique risks.
items.desc_zh: 前往南极洲和北极等目的地的远程探险邮轮正在蓬勃发展，但 MV Hondius 上的致命汉坦病毒提醒人们注意独特的风险。

items.title_en: Greg Abel knows Berkshire cold, but some miss the Buffett magic
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔（Greg Abel）知道伯克希尔的冷漠，但有些人怀念巴菲特的魔力
items.desc_en: Greg Abel is getting decent, if not spectacular, reviews for leading his first annual shareholders meeting as CEO.
items.desc_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔（Greg Abel）作为首席执行官领导了他的第一次年度股东大会，因此获得了不错的评价，即使不是很出色。

items.title_en: Americans oppose huge AI data centers in their towns. Tiny ones in their homes may be a different story
items.title_zh: 美国人反对在他们的城镇建立大型人工智能数据中心。家里的小孩子可能是一个不同的故事
items.desc_en: As public support for large-scale data center buildouts declines across the U.S., a new type designed to operate inside individual homes is coming.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国各地公众对大规模数据中心建设的支持下降，一种旨在在个人家庭内运行的新型数据中心即将问世。

items.title_en: Nvidia embraces role of AI investor, pushing past $40 billion in equity bets this year
items.title_zh: Nvidia 积极发挥人工智能投资者的作用，今年的股票投资额超过 400 亿美元
items.desc_en: Nvidia is pouring billions of dollars at a time into companies across the AI infrastructure stack, while also signing commercial deals with them.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达一次向人工智能基础设施堆栈的公司注入数十亿美元，同时还与他们签署商业协议。

items.title_en: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
items.title_zh: 为什么美国最大的汽车贷款机构之一不担心高车价或“永久贷款”
items.desc_en: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.
items.desc_zh: 尽管自 2019 年以来，汽车支付中位数已从 390 美元跃升至 525 美元，但第一资本提供的数据表明，与收入相比，汽车成本保持稳定。

items.title_en: Hungary's new PM to be sworn in during 'regime change' party
items.title_zh: 匈牙利新总理将在“政权更迭”派对上宣誓就职
items.desc_en: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.
items.desc_zh: 大约一个月前，彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 带领蒂萨党取得压倒性胜利，推翻了欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的统治。

items.title_zh: 当汉坦病毒船接近时，特内里费岛的愤怒和辞职
items.desc_en: Some on the Spanish island worry that the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.
items.desc_zh: 西班牙岛上的一些人担心 MV Hondius 即将抵达可能会带来健康风险。

items.title_zh: 主要加密法案定于 5 月 14 日参议院银行委员会投票
items.desc_en: The crypto industry's top legislative priority, a bill determining oversight of digital assets, is set to advance in the Senate Banking Committee.
items.desc_zh: 加密行业的首要立法重点是一项决定数字资产监管的法案，该法案将在参议院银行委员会中推进。

items.title_zh: 澳大利亚补选是右翼一国党的试金石
items.desc_en: Victory for the populist party in Farrer, New South Wales, would see One Nation's first MP elected to Australia's national parliament.
items.desc_zh: 如果民粹主义政党在新南威尔士州法雷尔获胜，一国党将成为澳大利亚国民议会的第一位议员。

items.title_en: The Trump-Xi summit is the next major deadline for investors awaiting a resolution to the U.S.-Iran war. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 对于等待美伊战争解决方案的投资者来说，特习峰会是下一个重要最后期限。这是接下来的事情
items.desc_en: Trump's apparent determination to wrap up the fighting in Iran is part of the reason why the stock market has been unruffled by the ongoing conflict.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普明显决心结束伊朗战斗，这是股市不受持续冲突影响的部分原因。

items.title_en: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.desc_en: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.desc_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title_en: Greece's examines mystery naval drone found in Ionian Sea
items.title_zh: 希腊检查在爱奥尼亚海发现的神秘海军无人机
items.desc_en: Greek media say the drone, which reportedly had explosives, could be either Ukrainian or linked to the Russia-Ukraine war.
items.desc_zh: 希腊媒体称，这架据报道装有爆炸物的无人机可能是乌克兰制造的，也可能与俄罗斯-乌克兰战争有关。

items.title_en: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
items.title_zh: 伊朗指责美国“鲁莽的军事冒险”
items.desc_en: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the US opts for a "reckless military adventure" every time a "diplomatic solution is on the table".
items.desc_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇表示，每次“外交解决方案摆在桌面上”时，美国都会选择“鲁莽的军事冒险”。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls increased 115,000 in April, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国4月非农就业人数增加11.5万人，超出预期；失业率为 4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，4 月份非农就业人数预计将增加 55,000 人。

items.title_en: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
items.title_zh: 特朗普的100万美元“金卡”未能在全球富豪中流行起来
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统的“金卡”承诺在“创纪录的时间内”获得美国居留权，但一直受到延误和法律问题的困扰。

items.title_en: Cyber attack disrupts swathe of US and Canada universities and schools
items.title_zh: 网络攻击扰乱了美国和加拿大的大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across North America.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了北美数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: White House calls Mark Hamill 'sick' after actor's Trump grave post
items.title_zh: 演员马克·哈米尔在特朗普墓碑上发表言论后，白宫称他“有病”
items.desc_en: The Star Wars actor apologised and deleted the post, which contained an AI image of the president in a shallow grave.
items.desc_zh: 这位星球大战演员道歉并删除了该帖子，其中包含总统在浅坟墓中的人工智能图像。

items.title_en: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
items.title_zh: 美国航空燃油可用于欧洲以缓解可能的短缺
items.desc_en: The price of jet fuel most European airlines currently use has jumped by half since the start of the war.
items.desc_zh: 自战争开始以来，大多数欧洲航空公司目前使用的航空燃油价格已经上涨了一半。

items.title_en: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
items.title_zh: 法院裁决后南非总统面临辞职
items.desc_en: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.
items.desc_zh: 宪法法院表示，国会议员阻止针对西里尔·拉马福萨的弹劾程序是错误的。

items.title_en: Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian island
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚岛屿火山喷发 造成三人死亡
items.desc_en: Officials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns.
items.desc_zh: 出于安全考虑，官员此前曾对攀登活火山发出警告。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡交火后油价上涨
items.desc_en: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，华盛顿和德黑兰之间的停火仍然有效。

items.title_en: Rebel Wilson accused of 'complete revision of history' as defamation case closes
items.title_zh: 诽谤案结束后，叛逆威尔逊被指控“彻底修改历史”
items.desc_en: The Bridesmaids star claims an actress retracted a complaint about sexual harassment by a producer.
items.desc_zh: 这位伴娘明星声称一名女演员撤回了对制片人性骚扰的投诉。

items.title_en: ‘Not a Chance Hormuz Opens’: How Wall Street’s new NACHO trade bets on a prolonged oil shock
items.title_zh: “霍尔木兹海峡没有机会开放”：华尔街的新NACHO贸易如何押注长期石油危机
items.desc_en: Traders are embracing the “NACHO” trade, betting Hormuz disruptions and elevated oil prices will persist longer than expected.
items.desc_zh: 贸易商正在拥抱“NACHO”贸易，押注霍尔木兹海峡的中断和油价上涨将持续比预期更长的时间。

items.title_en: Two Islamic-State linked Australian women charged with crimes against humanity
items.title_zh: 两名与伊斯兰国有联系的澳大利亚妇女被指控犯有反人类罪
items.desc_en: A third woman who also returned to Australia from Syria was charged with joining a terrorist organisation.
items.desc_zh: 第三名同样从叙利亚返回澳大利亚的女性被指控加入恐怖组织。

items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.title_en: In 'Musk v Altman', this judge will make the final call
items.title_zh: 在“马斯克诉奥特曼”中，这位法官将做出最终决定

items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future

items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_en: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
items.title_zh: OpenAI 联合创始人谈到马斯克时说：“我以为他会打我”

items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放

items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
